NEW Google Gemini Updates: 7 Free Features You Need to Try!

Google just dropped seven massive updates to the Gemini ecosystem, including the lightning-fast 1.5 Flash model and new cinematic features for Notebook LM. Learn how to use these free tools to build apps, design infographics, and transform your Google Search experience with AI Canvas.

04:27 - Custom AI Infographic Styles
05:22 - Google Search AI Canvas Mode

08:08 - Recap: Speed & Performance Upgrades
09:13 - AI Automation Community & Training
